_doc: Pinned external Claude Code skills. Installed by `make install-claude-skills` (script at .claude/tools/install-claude-skills.sh). See README.md → Phase A.5 and delivery/specs/available-skills.md.

clerk-backend-api._note: Currently committed in .claude/skills/. Hash recorded for tamper-detection. To migrate to install-on-demand, set ref to a pinned SHA, remove dir from git, and re-run install.

clerk-custom-ui._note: Currently committed in .claude/skills/. See clerk-backend-api note.

clerk-nextjs-patterns._note: Currently committed in .claude/skills/. See clerk-backend-api note.

clerk-testing._note: Currently committed in .claude/skills/. See clerk-backend-api note.

differential-review._note: Adversarial security review skill. Installed on-demand, not committed (see .gitignore). Loaded conditionally by kiat-backend-reviewer when diff touches security-critical paths (auth, crypto, RLS, payments).

sharp-edges._note: Cross-language security pitfalls. Installed on-demand, not committed.

frontend-design._note: Official Anthropic skill — production-grade frontend design language with bold aesthetic direction, anti-AI-slop guidance, accessibility. Replaces the placeholder `web-design-guidelines` entry from the original Kiat available-skills.md write-up. Loaded conditionally by kiat-frontend-reviewer for stories with significant visual/UX work where kiat-ui-ux-search would be overkill.

react-best-practices._note: Vercel Engineering's React/Next.js performance optimization skill — 45 rules across 8 categories (rendering, re-renders, bundle, async, client, etc.) prioritized by impact. MIT-licensed, maintained on the official vercel-labs org. Loaded conditionally by kiat-frontend-reviewer for performance-sensitive React stories. Caution: ~10k tokens — don't pull on trivial UI changes.

composition-patterns._note: Vercel Engineering's React composition architecture skill — compound components, state lifting, render-props-over-children, React 19 patterns (no forwardRef). MIT-licensed, same upstream + SHA as react-best-practices for atomic version bumps. Loaded conditionally by kiat-frontend-reviewer ONLY when the story creates/refactors a reusable component (used in 2+ places or going into the design system) — skip for one-off pages, trivial UI, or stories that just consume Shadcn primitives unchanged.

postgresql-table-design._note: Vendor-neutral PostgreSQL schema design reference — data type rules, indexing, partitioning, JSONB, MVCC, constraint design. Loaded conditionally by kiat-backend-coder (build-time) and kiat-backend-reviewer (review-time) when the story's `## Skills` lists it. Tech-spec-writer adds it for stories that create/modify migrations or design indexes. CAVEAT: the skill's RLS example uses Hasura-flavor current_user_id(); our project uses vanilla PostgreSQL with current_setting('request.jwt.claim.sub', true)::uuid — see delivery/specs/database-conventions.md §RLS for the canonical override on that one point. SOURCE-VETTING NOTE: wshobson is a personal-account GitHub repo, which conflicts with the user-recorded preference 'prefer anthropics/skills first; refuse personal-account repos'. Accepted at pin time because anthropics/skills publishes no PostgreSQL or database skill as of this SHA, and the content is vendor-neutral and high-quality. If anthropics/skills later ships a PG skill, replace this entry and re-pin. computedHash will be filled by `make install-claude-skills` on first install.
